broadcasts.message:
🎯 WEBUI/UX IMPROVEMENT OBJECTIVE: Analyzing current codebase and will delegate tasks. Key areas identified:

1. **Icon System**: PlaybackCard.razor still uses FontAwesome (fa-*) instead of custom SVG Icon component
2. **Visual Polish**: Add glassmorphism effects, better gradients, refined shadows
3. **Currently Playing Card**: Make more visually impressive with album art prominence
4. **Empty States**: Improve visual feedback when no content
5. **Animations**: Add subtle micro-interactions for state changes
6. **Responsive Polish**: Fine-tune mobile experience

Initial analysis complete. Delegating detailed implementation tasks now.

✅ TASK 1 COMPLETE: Replaced all FontAwesome icons with custom SVG Icon component

Changes made:
- Added "forward" and "pencil" icons to Icon.razor
- Updated PlaybackCard.razor: replaced fa-music, fa-play, fa-pause, fa-forward, fa-clock-o, fa-volume-up
- Updated MediaLists.razor: replaced fa-check, fa-pencil, fa-times
- Updated QueuePanel.razor: replaced fa-refresh with spin animation
- Added icon-spin CSS animation with prefers-reduced-motion support
- Enhanced playback card icon with glassmorphism effect

Build verified: SUCCESS (0 errors)

🎉 WEBUI/UX IMPROVEMENTS COMPLETE!

Summary of all changes:

✅ TASK 1 - ICON SYSTEM MODERNIZATION
- Replaced FontAwesome with custom SVG Icon component
- Added new icons: forward, pencil, refresh
- All PlaybackCard, MediaLists, QueuePanel icons updated
- Added icon-spin CSS animation

✅ TASK 2 - CURRENTLY PLAYING CARD
- Larger album art (140px) with shadow/glow
- Glassmorphism gradient background
- Better typography hierarchy with meta labels
- Progress display in monospace font
- Hover scale effect on album art

✅ TASK 3 - VISUAL POLISH
- Glassmorphism card styles (.glass-card)
- Page enter animations
- Enhanced shadows
- Playing pulse animation

✅ TASK 4 - EMPTY STATES
- Created reusable EmptyState.razor component
- Animated floating icon effect
- Updated QueuePanel to use EmptyState

✅ TASK 5 - MICRO-INTERACTIONS
- Icon spin animation for loading
- Page transitions
- All animations respect prefers-reduced-motion

Build: ✅ SUCCESS (0 errors)

Fixing text overflow across all pages. Key changes:
1. Add overflow-wrap: break-word and min-width: 0 to all table cells in site.css
2. Fix .lookup-info in StationLookup.razor.css  
3. Fix .schedule-card__body, .holiday-card__body in ConfigPage.razor.css
4. Fix .queue-panel__item in MediaLists.razor.css
5. Add text handling to .card-body in site.css
Priority: tables in site.css first (global fix), then component-level CSS.
